column1: # cdss_bench seed manifest.  One row per data type.
#   filename  file to place under seeds/data/
#   size_mib  expected/target seed size in MiB (used for synthetic fallback)
#   sha256    expected checksum, or "-" to skip verification (synthetic seeds)
#   source    where to fetch a REAL seed from; one of:
#               -                 (no real source; synthetic generator is used)
# To use REAL corpora: stage the four seed files (e.g. in an S3 bucket), then
# fill in sha256 + source below. Until then, fetch_seeds.sh generates
# deterministic synthetic seeds so the harness runs out-of-the-box anywhere.
